title: Profile Display Name Safe Baseline
purpose: Defines expected validation, edge-case coverage, and release observability for profile display-name changes.

referenceArtifacts.title: Shared validation contract
referenceArtifacts.body: Profile display-name rules should remain aligned between the client and server. The server must enforce the accepted length and character rules rather than relying only on the browser interface.

referenceArtifacts.title: Edge-case validation
referenceArtifacts.body: Display-name changes should test the exact supported length boundary and representative punctuation or international-name cases so expanded validation rules are verified beyond the common happy path.

referenceArtifacts.title: Rollout observability
referenceArtifacts.body: A display-name validation change should have a practical rollback path and enough production visibility to identify profile-update failures after release.
